'''√w-f-dh''' ('''kawafadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:laicise|laicise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-f-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:laicise|laicise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √w-f-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kawafadh
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thiwafadh || jiwafadh || shiwafadh || kiwafadh
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuwafadh || jujuwafadh || shushuwafadh || kukuwafadh
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuwafadh || juwafadh || shuwafadh || kuwafadh
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuwafadh || juwafadh || shuwafadh || kuwafadh
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thewafadh || jewafadh || shewafadh || kewafadh
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothowafadh || jojowafadh || shoshowafadh || kokowafadh
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thowafadh || jowafadh || showafadh || kowafadh
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thowafadh || jowafadh || showafadh || kowafadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || wafadh || wafadh || wafadh || wafadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || wafadh || wafadh || wafadh || wafadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || wafadh || wafadh || wafadh || wafadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || wafadh || wafadh || wafadh || wafadh
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæwafadh || jæwafadh || shæwafadh || kæwafadh
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathawafadh || jajawafadh || shashawafadh || kakawafadh
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thawafadh || jawafadh || shawafadh || kawafadh
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thawafadh || jawafadh || shawafadh || kawafadh
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shawafadh
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshawafadh
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishawafadh
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shawafadhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshawafadhnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishawafadhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shawafadhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshawafadhnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishawafadhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shawafadhro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshawafadhnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishawafadhro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shawafadhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshawafadhnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishawafadhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shawafadhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshawafadhnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishawafadhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shawafadhng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshawafadhnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishawafadhng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shawafadhya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshawafadhnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishawafadhya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shawafadhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshawafadhnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishawafadhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shawafadhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshawafadhnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishawafadhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shawafadhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshawafadhnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishawafadhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shawafadhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshawafadhnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishawafadhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shawafadhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshawafadhnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishawafadhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shawafadhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshawafadhnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishawafadhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shawafadhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshawafadhnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishawafadhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shawafadhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshawafadhnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishawafadhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shawafadhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshawafadhnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishawafadhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shawafadhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshawafadhnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishawafadhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shawafadhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshawafadhnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishawafadhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shawafadhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshawafadhnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishawafadhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shawafadhmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshawafadhnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishawafadhmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
